name: osheen-mvp
description: Osheen MVP: AI virtual trial room and emotional styling platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
